# Olivers Consulting

Olivers Consulting helps UK ecommerce and wholesale businesses automate repetitive data and admin work: supplier files, product listings, stock updates, reporting, invoices, catalogue content and document processing.

Founder: Henry Oliver. Henry has 11 years running multi-channel ecommerce, formerly PwC and Citi, and built automations first inside his own 200,000 SKU operation across Shopify, Amazon and eBay.

Core offer:
- Free 30-minute process review
- Supplier data pipelines
- Reports that write themselves
- Channel and stock sync
- Order-to-invoice admin
- Catalogue content and document engine
- Fixed-price builds
- Optional care plan

Key proof point:
- Supplier-file process reduced from 8 hours to 2 minutes with human review and bad rows flagged before publishing.

Important URLs:
- Homepage: https://oliversconsulting.co.uk/
- Sitemap: https://oliversconsulting.co.uk/sitemap.xml
